'''âf-m-p-l''' ('''kafampeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:escalator|escalator]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-m-p-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:escalator|escalator]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-m-p-l
|-
! Lemma
| kafampeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==

''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
